'''âd-h-th''' ('''kadahath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yatter|yatter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yatter|yatter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-h-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadahath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahath|thidahath]] || [[word:jidahath|jidahath]] || [[word:shidahath|shidahath]] || [[word:kidahath|kidahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudahath|thuthudahath]] || [[word:jujudahath|jujudahath]] || [[word:shushudahath|shushudahath]] || [[word:kukudahath|kukudahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudahath|thudahath]] || [[word:judahath|judahath]] || [[word:shudahath|shudahath]] || [[word:kudahath|kudahath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudahath|thudahath]] || [[word:judahath|judahath]] || [[word:shudahath|shudahath]] || [[word:kudahath|kudahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedahath|thedahath]] || [[word:jedahath|jedahath]] || [[word:shedahath|shedahath]] || [[word:kedahath|kedahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodahath|thothodahath]] || [[word:jojodahath|jojodahath]] || [[word:shoshodahath|shoshodahath]] || [[word:kokodahath|kokodahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodahath|thodahath]] || [[word:jodahath|jodahath]] || [[word:shodahath|shodahath]] || [[word:kodahath|kodahath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodahath|thodahath]] || [[word:jodahath|jodahath]] || [[word:shodahath|shodahath]] || [[word:kodahath|kodahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdahath|thĂŠdahath]] || [[word:jĂŠdahath|jĂŠdahath]] || [[word:shĂŠdahath|shĂŠdahath]] || [[word:kĂŠdahath|kĂŠdahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadahath|thathadahath]] || [[word:jajadahath|jajadahath]] || [[word:shashadahath|shashadahath]] || [[word:kakadahath|kakadahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadahath|thadahath]] || [[word:jadahath|jadahath]] || [[word:shadahath|shadahath]] || [[word:kadahath|kadahath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadahath|thadahath]] || [[word:jadahath|jadahath]] || [[word:shadahath|shadahath]] || [[word:kadahath|kadahath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadahath|shadahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadahath|goshadahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadahath|gokishadahath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadahathnĂŒ|shadahathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadahathnknĂŒ|goshadahathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahathnĂŒ|gokishadahathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadahathshĂ«|shadahathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadahathnkshĂ«|goshadahathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadahathshĂ«|gokishadahathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahathro|shadahathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahathnkro|goshadahathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahathro|gokishadahathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahathmu|shadahathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahathnkmu|goshadahathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahathmu|gokishadahathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadahathsher|shadahathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadahathnksher|goshadahathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadahathsher|gokishadahathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadahathng|shadahathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadahathnkng|goshadahathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadahathng|gokishadahathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadahathya|shadahathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadahathnkya|goshadahathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadahathya|gokishadahathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadahathyam|shadahathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadahathnkyam|goshadahathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadahathyam|gokishadahathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahathnĂŒshĂ«|shadahathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadahathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadahathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahathnĂŒro|shadahathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahathnknĂŒro|goshadahathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahathnĂŒro|gokishadahathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahathnĂŒmu|shadahathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahathnknĂŒmu|goshadahathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahathnĂŒmu|gokishadahathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahathshĂ«nĂŒ|shadahathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadahathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadahathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahathshĂ«ro|shadahathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahathnkshĂ«ro|goshadahathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahathshĂ«ro|gokishadahathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahathshĂ«mu|shadahathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahathnkshĂ«mu|goshadahathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahathshĂ«mu|gokishadahathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahathronĂŒ|shadahathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahathnkronĂŒ|goshadahathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahathronĂŒ|gokishadahathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahathroshĂ«|shadahathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahathnkroshĂ«|goshadahathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahathroshĂ«|gokishadahathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahathromu|shadahathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahathnkromu|goshadahathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahathromu|gokishadahathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahathmunĂŒ|shadahathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahathnkmunĂŒ|goshadahathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahathmunĂŒ|gokishadahathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahathmushĂ«|shadahathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahathnkmushĂ«|goshadahathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahathmushĂ«|gokishadahathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahathmuro|shadahathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahathnkmuro|goshadahathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahathmuro|gokishadahathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
